metadata.title: Altcoin lens - real-utility vs narrative-beta, mapped to threads
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (Chainlink/SWIFT, Hedera council, Story/a16z $80M@$2.25B, QRL/Mochimo, Stellar/Franklin Templeton, Sui/Mysten ex-Diem). Grades are honest assessments, NOT price predictions.

XRP (Ripple).adoption: SBI ~9% owner; bank corridors (RippleNet); RLUSD; spot ETF; SEC case won in part (2023)
XRP (Ripple).token_value_accrual: moderate (payments volume != token demand; XRP largely speculative)
XRP (Ripple).thread: payments/Japan (SBI) + SEC selective-enforcement thread (Hinman ETH vs XRP)

LINK (Chainlink).adoption: SWIFT (11,500 banks; tokenized-bond milestone Apr-2026), Euroclear, UBS, JPM Kinexys, Mastercard, Ondo; ~$75B secured; CRE runtime live
LINK (Chainlink).token_value_accrual: improving (staking/CCIP fees) but value-accrual still debated
LINK (Chainlink).thread: THE tokenization 'picks & shovels' -> BIS Project Agora / stablecoin rails

HBAR (Hedera).adoption: 31-member council (Google/IBM/Boeing/FedEx/Standard Bank); >$10B RWA settled; SWIFT ISO20022 test; SEC/CFTC 'digital commodity'; acquired Hyperledger Fabric IP
HBAR (Hedera).token_value_accrual: WEAK ('enterprise adoption means nothing when token holders get ~zero revenue' - the core critique)

ALGO (Algorand).adoption: ~$0.09, mcap ~$0.8B (#62); Revolut staking, PostFinance; classified 'digital commodity'

Story / IP (Story Protocol).what: L1 to tokenize INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY for the AI era
Story / IP (Story Protocol).adoption: a16z $80M Series B at $2.25B val; 'IP Legos'; Bieber/BTS/Blackpink/Adidas; pitched as creator defense vs LLMs
Story / IP (Story Protocol).thread: AI x IP provenance -> DIRECTLY the Disney/Sora thread; a16z = the connective weaver node

QRL (Quantum Resistant Ledger).adoption: live since 2018; +45% spikes on quantum-risk headlines (Mar-2026); tiny mcap
QRL (Quantum Resistant Ledger).thread: quantum thread -> same narrative as LAES/WKEY (PQC chips)

MCM (Mochimo).adoption: niche PQ community; minimal institutional use

POL (Polygon).adoption: large ecosystem, payments push; broad DeFi/enterprise pilots

XLM (Stellar).adoption: MoneyGram; USDC on Stellar; Franklin Templeton BENJI tokenized money-market fund runs on Stellar; co-founded by Jed McCaleb
XLM (Stellar).thread: payments + RWA tokenization + the McCaleb Mt.Gox->Ripple->Stellar lineage (spec-crypto-sec-epstein)

SUI (Mysten Labs).adoption: built by ex-Meta DIEM/Novi engineers (Mysten Labs); a16z-backed (FTX historically); DeFi/gaming throughput
SUI (Mysten Labs).thread: DIRECT Meta/Diem-stablecoin lineage (the Facebook coin that died, reborn as Sui) + a16z connective node

_meta.finding: Real tokenization/payments infra (LINK/HBAR/XRP/ALGO) with weak token-value accrual; thematic alts (Story/QRL/MCM) ride the same AI-IP/quantum narratives as equity microcaps; only BTC durably up in gold. a16z is a recurring connective node (Story, Fairshake, Worldcoin).
